patterns.notify_watcher_pattern: dispatcher.rs and merge_gate.rs use notify-debouncer-mini with 100ms debounce. Pattern: spawn thread, create debouncer, watch directory recursively, send events over mpsc channel to async runtime.
patterns.terminal_width_detection: gantt.rs has term_width() function using ioctl TIOCGWINSZ on Unix. Detects width at runtime, works in Zellij panes and tmux.
patterns.ansi_cursor_control: Use ANSI escape codes for cursor positioning: \x1b[{N}A moves cursor up N lines. Must track line count of last output.
patterns.signal_handling: Use tokio::signal::ctrl_c() for clean shutdown. Drop watcher before exit to avoid fd leak.
patterns.stats_display: list.rs already has calculate_stats() and print_summary() for displaying counts and averages.

existing_implementations.description: notify crate already integrated in spec 020. Dispatcher and merge-gate use it to watch .cards/ for filesystem events. Terminal width detection exists in gantt.rs using ioctl.
